case_number: Criminal Jail Appeal No. S-88 of 2019

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Criminal Jail Appeal No. S-88 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on M.A No.804/26 (Transfer of custody). 2. For hearing of main case. 02.03.2026 Mr. Safdar Ali Bhutto, Advocate for appellant. Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, D.P.G for the State. *************** In compliance with order dated 23.02.2026, accused Gada Hussain has been produced by the jail authorities. Through M.A No. S-804/2026, the sister of the appellant/ accused seeks transfer of his custody from Central Prison and Correctional Facility, Sukkur to Central Prison and Correctional Facility, Larkana. Learned counsel for the appellant submits that the appellant has preferred the present appeal against his conviction and was initially confined at Central Prison Larkana. It is stated that due to flood in the year 2022, the said prison was damaged and, on account of repair and rehabilitation work, the appellant’s custody was shifted to Central Prison and Correctional Facility, Khairpur Mirs, and thereafter to Central Prison and Correctional Facility, Sukkur. He contends that the custody of other co-accused has since been transferred back to Central Prison and Correctional Facility, Larkana, whereas the appellant continues to remain confined at Sukkur Jail, causing hardship and inconvenience to his family members in meeting and pursuing the appeal, which is pending at Larkana. Learned counsel for the complainant is called absent. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh, waives notice and does not oppose the application. He submits that since the appeal of the appellant is pending before this Court at Larkana and the earlier transfer was necessitated due to repair work of the jail, he has no objection if the appellant is transferred back to Central Prison and Correctional Facility, Larkana.

Learned Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh, waives notice and does not oppose the application. He submits that since the appeal of the appellant is pending before this Court at Larkana and the earlier transfer was necessitated due to repair work of the jail, he has no objection if the appellant is transferred back to Central Prison and Correctional Facility, Larkana. Appellant also supports contents of application. Heard. Considering that the appellant’s appeal is pending before this Court at Larkana and the earlier transfer was occasioned due to exigencies arising from flood damage and repair work, and further that the State has not opposed the request, it would be appropriate, in the interest of convenience and proper facilitation of proceedings, to allow the application. Accordingly, M.A No. S-804/2026 is allowed. The Superintendent, Central Prison and Correctional Facility, Sukkur, is directed to transfer the custody of appellant Gada Hussain to Central Prison and Correctional Facility, Larkana, in accordance with law and jail rules. Let a copy of this order be communicated to the concerned jail authorities for compliance. The matter is adjourned to be fixed on 06.04.2026. Judge Irshad Ali M/Steno
